title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
